# Portal.view.learn: Page & NavButton titles

I think we need to go a bit more into the breadcrumb direction:

Example:
<img width="1197" alt="Screenshot 2024-03-17 at 14 26 38" src="https://github.com/neomjs/neo/assets/1177434/ba05579b-ae29-4462-b1d3-0d845040b9d9">

The title just says "Introduction" => meaning "Guides > Main thread addons > Introduction".
There is a top-level item called "Introduction" too, so this feels confusing.

The same goes for our NavButtons, especially in case the next / prev item is inside a different group (folder).

@mxmrtns @maxrahder
